subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One, Who hath adorned His chosen ones with the ornament of supreme steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصود را لایق و سزاست که اولیای خود را بطراز استقامت کبری مزین فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
